_comment: gama (蝦蟇) — strong local floor on a remote Mac Studio running MLX (mlx_lm.server, OpenAI-compatible) reached over SSH (no open port; request JSON on stdin). Set ssh_host to your Mac's SSH host (user@host, or a ~/.ssh/config Host; Tailscale name works). Models are mlx-community ids present on the Mac — list them with `ssh <host> curl -s localhost:8080/v1/models`. Local-only variant: gama_config.example.json. Re-measure with `tehai bench --backends claude-tui,codex,ssh-openai --config <this> --propose ...` then merge the routing_table.
